ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country (e.g., AFG, ALB) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "aridity_index" REAL /* Aridity index value */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "diurnal_temperature_range" REAL /* Diurnal temperature range in degrees Celsius */,
  "ground_frost_frequency" REAL /* Ground frost frequency in days */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Mean temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "potential_evapotranspiration_day" REAL /* Potential evapotranspiration in mm/day */,
  "potential_evapotranspiration_month" REAL /* Potential evapotranspiration in mm/month */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm/month */,
  "rain_days" REAL /* Rain days */,
  "vapor_pressure" REAL /* Vapor pressure in hPa */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the country where the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the data type belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., aridity index, cloud cover) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the variable belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_variables_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_variables_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., degrees Celsius, mm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the point belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the data point belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES climate_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the version (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used in the project */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the data belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., view, download) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., database, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
